backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard backend, defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Contract, etc.) and persistent state for jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, goals, and user profiles with access control integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of a destructive-styled, admin-only 'Reset' button in the MaintenanceManagement component UI with no click handler logic attached.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary file listing short descriptions of all frontend source files, used for build planning and documentation reference.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React frontend, mounting the app into a div with id 'root' and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, handles authentication, profile setup, data migration, and lazy-loads the Dashboard with role and profile props.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Dialog component for adding inflow or outflow transactions to a specific fund, with form fields for amount, category, description, and type, using the useAddFundTransaction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Dialog component for creating new business goals with fields for description, target metrics, target date, and milestone tracking, using the useAddGoal mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment fund transactions (payments or allocations) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description. Submits via the `useAddInvestmentFundTransaction` mutation and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog for logging maintenance expenses that validates input, checks fund balance, then sequentially creates a maintenance expense record and a corresponding ledger entry to deduct from the maintenance fund. Invalidates related queries on success.
Renders memoized bar and line charts for monthly revenue/expenses and profit projections using Recharts, fetching data via custom hooks. Includes error handling with a retry button and loading states.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A static informational component that notifies users that archived investments have been replaced by the new Investment Fund system, listing its features and providing a navigation button to the Investment Fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists locally stored backup versions with options to download (as JSON) or delete each version, displaying metadata like timestamp and size. Uses utility functions from `useQueries` to manage backup version state.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings panel for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters including van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, and chemicals cost per hour. Saves settings to localStorage and shows a save button when unsaved changes exist.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management UI for contracts, allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and filter contracts by name/status, with support for standardized services, area tiers, and agreed pricing.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for fund type, name, initial balance, spending limit, and approval threshold.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: Provides forms and tables for adding, editing, and deleting jobs and expenses, with inline edit/delete dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Handles one-time migration of jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, and goals from localStorage to the backend, showing progress and errors in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog form for editing an existing expense's amount, date, category, and additional info, submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing fund's name, balance, spending limit, approval threshold, and active status, using the useUpdateFund mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing a job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, using the useUpdateJob mutation with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button using a destructive alert style.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expense management UI with search, category filtering, bulk selection, edit, and delete capabilities, displaying filtered expenses in a table with totals.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: Displays key financial metrics (revenue, profit, fund balances) as expandable cards with fund editing and transaction dialogs, using memoized calculations for performance.
A tabbed funds management page showing operational funds, transactions, transfers, and alerts, with support for creating, editing, deleting funds and adding transactions.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Displays an investment fund overview with summary cards (initial capital, current balance, total payments, total allocations) and a transaction history table. Admins can add new transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form to create a new invoice by selecting a quote and entering customer details, then generates and downloads a PDF upon successful creation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices with search and status filtering, and supports PDF download, status toggle (Paid/Pending), and deletion (admin-only) for each invoice.
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar view of scheduled jobs, allowing navigation between months and clicking a job to open a details dialog.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial fields) that restricts editing to admin users and submits updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (net profit trend, job completion rate, VAT due, and fund delta) by computing metrics from financial, jobs, and invoices query data.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and a configurable message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Renders a maintenance management section with fund balance overview, inflow/outflow summaries, and an expense log table, with admin controls to add expenses or reset the fund.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile viewports that lists all app tabs and conditionally includes a Settings item for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Displays a monthly financial report with selectable month/year, goal tracking, and options to export as CSV or print; also supports adding new goals via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin panel for viewing and editing tiered service rates across five cleaning service types, with save functionality that batches updates via the setServiceRate mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (admin or viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent-provided save callback.
A React component that provides a multi-step quote calculator for cleaning services, computing pricing tiers, COGS breakdowns (fuel, chemicals, pilot costs), add-ons, volume discounts, and VAT before saving the quote via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: A React component that displays, filters, and manages saved quotes with search/filter controls, cost breakdown calculations, and options to download client-facing or internal PDF reports and delete quotes.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: A React component that shows unit economics summaries and provides export buttons for cash flow and unit economics reports in CSV and PDF formats using job and expense data.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog component that lets users configure dashboard preferences (dark mode, layout, metric filters) and persists them via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) using the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including user profiles, jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, contracts, and backups, with BigInt serialization helpers and configurable stale times.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including primary, background, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote and invoice PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML and triggering the print dialog, with helpers for formatting service rates and totals.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports in CSV or printable PDF format by combining and sorting job revenue and expense transactions with a running balance calculation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page that renders tabbed navigation across all app sections (overview, jobs, quotes, invoices, funds, etc.) and handles data preloading, backup, and role-based access control.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that presents a branded card with an Internet Identity login button, handling login state and error toasts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads canister IDs from dfx JSON files, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a dev-server proxy to the local ICP replica.
project_state.json: Tracks the DroneWash Dashboard project state including current features, pending feature requests (ledger delete/edit and reset button), architectural micro-step strategy, and rollback checkpoint at draft 50.
